entity_name: UK CH disqualified-directors x ICIJ matches (multiple)
evidence_value: An earlier track that cross-referenced ICIJ officer names against the OpenSanctions 'gb_coh_disqualified' dataset returned ~219 unique-on-both-sides names. A live UK Companies House search confirmed that none of the 219 names appears on the current UK CH disqualified-officers register. The OS dataset appears to classify sanctioned individuals as 'corp.disqual' beyond the strict UK CDDA court register. The track was downgraded as a result and is documented here as a methodology example.
